prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为 5524→6588→9004→9146→10703，整体持续后移，近 4 年累计后移约 5179 名；2025 年基准约 10703 名，后移趋势明显；该校在河北省物理类招生计划：2021 年 38 人、2022 年 38 人、2023 年 38 人、2024 年 34 人、2025 年 43 人；2026 年计划 40 人，较 2025 年缩招 3 人（-7.0%），缩招使竞争略有缓解，位次数字有减小倾向。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 56 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 46–56 区间，属政法类顶尖院校；2026 年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面（早年校园安全事件，距今较远影响有限）；抖音热度总排名第 6（高热），综合热度约 975 万，在 211 院校中曝光度极高，反映报考关注度持续升温；历史投档异常方面，2024 年内蒙古理科法学类曾出现投档线暴跌（低关注），对河北影响有限；法学 A+（全国唯一法学 A+ 院校），物理类招生专业中法学类占比较高，学科吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学大类社会热度 2021–2024 年持续偏热，2024 年转为分化观望（63.54），整体仍属热门方向；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 60.98 万，物理类按近年约 60% 占比估算约 36.48 万人，较 2025 年（36.30 万）微增，竞争基本持平；中国政法大学位于北京，非本省院校；该校在河北省招生占比约 2–3%，属正常跨省招生规模，无明显地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续大幅后移趋势、2026 年缩招 3 人使竞争略有缓解、抖音高热反映报考关注度升温、法学专业热度偏热等因素，在 2025 年基准 10703 名基础上，缩招效应与热度效应相互对冲，预计最低位次较 2025 年小幅前移（位次数字减小）但幅度有限；预测最低位次约 10305 名，区间 9805–10805 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 5524→6588→9004→9146→10703, showing a continuous backward shift, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5179 places in the last 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 10703, with a clear backward trend; the university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province for Physics Category: 38 in 2021, 38 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 34 in 2024, 43 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 40, a reduction of 3 (-7.0%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and tends to decrease the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking about 56th (2026), stable in the 46–56 range in recent years, a top-tier political science and law institution; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance exam cycle is slightly negative (early campus safety incidents, limited impact due to distance); Douyin heat total ranking 6th (high heat), comprehensive heat about 9.75 million, extremely high exposure among 211 universities, reflecting rising attention from applicants; historical admission anomalies: in 2024, Inner Mongolia Science category law major saw a sharp drop in admission scores (low attention), with limited impact on Hebei; Law A+ (the only law A+ institution nationwide), law majors account for a high proportion among Physics Category admissions, with strong subject appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social heat of the law major category from 2021 to 2024 remained consistently high, turning to differentiation and wait-and-see in 2024 (63.54), but still a popular direction; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 609,800, with Physics Category estimated at about 364,800 based on the recent 60% proportion, a slight increase from 2025 (363,000), with competition basically flat; China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, not a provincial institution; its enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 2–3%, a normal cross-province enrollment scale, with no obvious regional preference deviation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous significant backward trend in historical rankings, the slight easing of competition due to the reduction of 3 places in 2026, the high Douyin heat reflecting rising application attention, and the relatively high popularity of law majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 10703, the reduction effect and heat effect offset each other, the minimum ranking is expected to move slightly forward (ranking number decreases) but with limited magnitude; the predicted minimum ranking is about 10305, with a range of 9805–10805.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 9805–10805, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 law majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<9805), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 law experimental classes and dual degree programs; for rankings close to the upper limit (>10805), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety. Physics Category candidates applying for CUPL law majors should note the intense competition and are advised to position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings and major preferences.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 654 → 815 → 1496 → 1641 → 1697, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 900 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1697, and the backward shift speed has slowed in the last two years; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province: 50 in 2021, 55 in 2022, 55 in 2023, 65 in 2024, 74 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 69, a reduction of 5 (-6.8%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and tends to decrease the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 56th (2026), stable in the 46–56 range in recent years, a top-tier political science and law institution; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative (involving early campus safety incidents, with limited impact due to distance); Douyin popularity total ranking 6th (high heat), comprehensive heat about 9.75 million, extremely high exposure among 211 universities, reflecting rising application attention; historical admission anomalies: in 2024, the law category in Inner Mongolia experienced a sharp drop in admission scores (low attention), with limited impact on Hebei; Law A+ (the only Law A+ institution nationwide), highly matching the admission majors; Political Science, Sociology, and other disciplines also provide support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Law major category from 2021 to 2024 has been consistently high, turning to differentiation and wait-and-see in 2024 (63.54), but overall still a popular direction in liberal arts; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in the province in 2026 is about 609,800, with History Category estimated at about 245,000 based on the recent 40% proportion, a slight increase from 2025 (243,700), with competition basically flat; China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, not a provincial institution; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 2–3% (2025 History Category + Physics Category total about 117, accounting for about 3% of national enrollment), a normal cross-provincial enrollment scale, with no obvious regional preference deviation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight easing of competition due to the reduction of 5 places in 2026, the rising application attention reflected by high Douyin heat, and the high popularity of the Law major, with the baseline of 1697 in 2025, the reduction effect and heat effect offset each other, the minimum ranking is expected to move slightly forward (ranking number decreases) but with limited magnitude; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1648, with a range of 1348–1948.
